title: 🐜 Ant — drop one pheromone per tick

abilities.text: Read existing pheromones (Issues labeled ant-pheromone), find the least-explored topic, drop one new pheromone.
Each pheromone's prev_hash links to the most-recent existing pheromone. Tampering breaks the chain.
Each new pheromone references prior pheromones via links_to — cross-pollination is the work.
Default safety — returns the pheromone JSON without posting. Pass dry_run=False + a github_token to actually post.

flavor_text: One ant drops one pheromone. The colony reads them all.
